title: Useless Additions
description: Adds hundreds of new items and blocks.
body:
## Mob Shards

Almost every mob has its own mob shard, these can be used to craft items that relate to the mob and spawn eggs.
Crafted spawn eggs can be further used to craft survival spawners that function almost identically to regular spawners but spawn mobs at a slower rate.

_Note: ores have since been removed._

![Mob Shards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/znfQLgN4/images/fb5c4dbd7fdacaef4c83a740f3110cbd7c23a4c3.png)

## Bundles

Bundles are now craftable and can hold up to 128 items.
Bundles can also now be upgraded to increase their storage space.

## Dragon Drops

After the dragon has died, it will fling several items into the air.
These include:

- Dragon flesh
- Dragon scale
- Dragon heart

Additionally, dragon scales can be used to craft a new tier of tools and armor which are slightly more powerful than netherite.

![Dragon Drops](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/znfQLgN4/images/547568816368f7368db3b0215176fe511f7dd64e.png)
![Dragon Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/znfQLgN4/images/8fd0d6e642b630b4852ff4fdcfb9ee6a4c2cae4e.png)

## Enchantments

A few new enchantments have been added for you to use.
Some of these enchantments include:

- Life Leech, steal health from hit players/mobs
- Repairing, alternative to mending, causes tools to repair themselves over time while not being used/held
- Auto Smelting, smelts any blocks mined
- Everlasting, stops item from despawning when dropped
- Soul Bound, item is kept on death

## Pipes

Pipes are an alternative to hoppers and can transport/insert/extract items in all 6 directions.
To transport items pipes require a pipe engine to be connected within 8 blocks. 
What direction items move in and whether a pipe will insert or extract items is also dependent on what direction the pipe engine is placed in.

![Pipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/znfQLgN4/images/9ea82b3520cd86de9f5351f20032a7c4a66a4313.gif)

## Slime Pearl

Slime pearls can be crafted from one slime ball and one ender pearl and will bounce once after thrown.

![Slime Pearl](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/znfQLgN4/images/0efa12f197c5e5bd3e2c0a83ab6e7f3b3c026326.gif)

## Other Stuff

Useless Additions adds a bunch of other stuff for you to use, but you'll have to find out about those in game. :D

If you have any ideas you'd like to see added, let me know and I might add them!



_Cross mod support for [hud icons](https://modrinth.com/mod/uaddicons)_

_Please use [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) instead of [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) as the mod does not currently support [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) for its crafting stations/recipe types_
